title: Content review sidecar
description: Written next to a content file as <basename>.review.json by the content-review skill.

content_id.description: Stable id, e.g. the content file basename.

reviewers.description: Which skills/subagents contributed, e.g. seo-editor, copyright-risk-reviewer.

publishable.description: Hard gate. Must be true to publish. False => revise first.

monetization.description: How this content monetizes. If 'affiliate', the gate requires an FTC disclosure in the content.

scores.description: Optional human-facing scores. NOT used as a gate (LLM floats are unstable).

metadata.description: Publish metadata the gate checks for presence (per config/publish.json frontMatter.required).
